title: Agent Event
description: A single status/progress event emitted by an agent during a run. Agents append these as newline-delimited JSON to /workspace/output/events.jsonl. The monolith tails this file to track run progress.

run_id.description: Must match the run_id from the task envelope this event belongs to.

event_type.description: What kind of event this is.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event occurred.

message.description: Short human-readable description of what happened. Required for 'step' and 'failed'.

data.description: Event-type-specific structured payload. See per-type notes below.

allOf.comment: started: no extra fields required. Marks the agent process actually began executing inside the container.
step: message required. data may include a 'step_name' and 'progress' (0-1 float) for dashboard display.
artifact-written: data must include relative_path so the monolith knows what to collect from /workspace/output.

relative_path.description: Path relative to /workspace/output where this artifact was written.

allOf.comment: completed: data should include output_path pointing at the final result JSON validated against the agent's output schema.

output_path.description: Path relative to /workspace/output to the final schema-validated result file.

allOf.comment: failed: message required, describing the failure. data may include 'error_code' and 'fatal' (bool).
